textByHashes.7a765426912549b8816ad62d3f07832eb4458c39: No I don't, as it happens. Sorry.
textByHashes.fe4f84a450596bf9abd616b6de175da81b500600: Well, you were told wrong then!
textByHashes.43c9ba59be4d39a71dcdef299892ebc29e3e9f92: Oh, you think so?!? And what concern is it of yours?
textByHashes.e478bde196839745f204401479b987ab6eacf2ac: Is that right?!? Well, I do actually have some snowdrop seeds, but you would be the last person I would give them to.
textByHashes.2cba066c97be1ba39f6416d4272c6ac496b5c4fd: I must say, you don't often meet people who show concern the way you have done.
textByHashes.4b3d55b2aec2c172271a10b1eeb3ca3b3f8d9070: And to think I listened to you! I was right after all - there is no kindness between human beings anymore.
textByHashes.50dd8977411157a28e46d2d9efae33b4af5ff3af: All these people, asking me to look after their crops! And no-one ever asking me how I feel, or if there's something they can do for me!
textByHashes.f50c9994086a82ec05dd32d2e8cf820176358758: Oh, that's very kind of you! And there I was, thinking of giving it all up and heading off across the seas to find my fortune!
textByHashes.5fb9aaeb3519bff3c0b28cc1bafaa66e90e83f55: If you carry on speaking to me like that I might just put this spade to good use, and I'm not talking about digging!
textByHashes.a64eca4788e9829ea4160b81525250e59a42485b: I'd like just for once for somebody to grow something for me. Just something simple; some vegetables would be nice.
textByHashes.af0641a9296636170477036f2f119262d6543f67: Nah, there's a whole field of them over to the west. I don't have any particular use for onions, so how about cabbages, then?
textByHashes.3b71969cb7203e364c946d0b30a1f0c6d2db4564: Oh, in one of these allotments here. Plant them from seed, and when they're ready for harvesting let me know, I'll give you your seeds.
textByHashes.58c97dba539569114b61138c664343fa3b764cb5: And I'm not wasting my seeds on an upstart like you!
textByHashes.5f9f0dbac720dbc86b77ce6de8575b79dfa1d026: Not after speaking to me like that you upstart!!! Is it a deal or not?!?
textByHashes.fd019ea61efdd598da3e36c5bdf7e7ba12e8411c: You said that you would grow me some cabbages in one of these allotments. When they're ready for harvest come and talk to me, and I'll give you those snowdrop seeds that you're after.
textByHashes.619b68faaa5f2970af630e18950bfde4ef01d6b8: Yes, I saw - what fine farming prowess! Nobody has ever done anything like that for me before; here you go, these are the seeds you were after I believe.
textByHashes.d2679f77a3d0d59366e3533a86c9a2adb4d804a2: I would give you some, but you don't appear to have room to carry them.
textByHashes.279f54201972c5aeb134fe71184a737875443a9a: Yes, here you go - I hope they grow for you.
textByHashes.a0772acd9c13cb9ece0ef8e35d05448a70838916: I can't believe you're asking me to do that! I asked you to grow some cabbages for me, not for me to look after them for you! No, I won't look after them!
textByHashes.5a2a114d0d28679f0a9461bb28f004f9d81abc59: I might - which one were you thinking of?
textByHashes.31695811dd0e28f6544fc14e980339fe93649a20: You don't have any seeds planted in that patch. Plant some and I might agree to look after it for you.
textByHashes.afa4c7dd799e237ef8992f1ef147eb9959379c1e: That patch is already fully grown! I don't know what you want me to do with it!
textByHashes.aa74f7c8cf0dd5cd9836ea178e223bbc22d87cec: That patch is dead - it's too late for me to do anything about it now.
textByHashes.c13ac83f4a7fc23480d36a92e5d6a55228724aef: That patch is diseased - you should cure it before asking me to be responsible for it!
textByHashes.8fb7dd5151767fa469a8c9065710bd252dac8218: I don't know what you're talking about - I'm already looking after that patch for you.
textByHashes.c47f5f8a8e189d4e80f22d8bb43f0b71e996a470: If you like, but I want 2 buckets of compost for that.
textByHashes.3f11dbf93226711b5819390774f4c4bb733e9f18: Well, I'm not wasting my time for free.
textByHashes.60f719b1a5f6ab656f8f0b0f2606e28ff1e6e430: That'll do nicely, sir. Leave it with me - I'll make sure that patch grows for you.
textByHashes.9d1b16fbbba1a8e9b65bf6fee6778793fca73a2f: That'll do nicely, madam. Leave it with me - I'll make sure that patch grows for you.
textByHashes.3fc86a7d721d7ec3e7ee543b694bc061f751f18c: If you like, but I want one sack of potatoes for that.
textByHashes.a1612ac7a3e3504b63300b077133ffe8f98c3fd4: If you like, but I want one sack of onions for that.
textByHashes.072403c701445e63e57573f88fa96ad3f988fca0: If you like, but I want 2 sacks of cabbages for that.
textByHashes.bff17cf21c918eea424de6bc71abe41d3c1272f9: If you like, but I want 10 jute fibres for that.
textByHashes.349f44cb73c5ae309dc56f0b31a8b1d369d47ec9: If you like, but I want one basket of apples for that.
textByHashes.c332e67d8be656f628d2c9224d79e9ad815738b8: If you like, but I want 10 curry leaves for that.
textByHashes.c26cef978941da3da11f034533639dfddae8158a: If you like, but I want 5 jangerberries for that.
textByHashes.a948ca937c898af560bec30046158b9876f416f8: The only way to cure a bush or tree of disease is to prune away the diseased leaves with a pair of secateurs. For all other crops I would just apply some plant-cure.
textByHashes.ae656597b0ced63456f873ed91659b56014f23e4: Tree seeds must be grown in a plantpot of soil into a sapling, and then transferred to a tree patch to continue growing to adulthood.
textByHashes.a6edaedac0ebb731b3bb6159665e00c5cb4113ef: You can put up to ten potatoes, cabbages or onions in vegetable sacks, although you can't have a mix in the same sack.
textByHashes.aeb9f67ee8999d8f166f56091580bd6dd9bc95eb: You can buy all the farming tools from farming shops, which can be found close to the allotments.
textByHashes.a29a52df2fc06db96d8448aaded4561eb6c73210: Bittercap mushrooms can only be grown in a special patch in Morytania, near the Mort Myre swamp. There the ground is especially dank and suited to growing poisonous fungii.
textByHashes.2b5080fa3126d7f92fc6d4d7342716184af27023: Supercompost is far better than normal compost, but more expensive to make. You need to rot the right type of item; show me an item, and I'll tell you if it's super- compostable or not.
textByHashes.5f5d70ffca0e626c6fd81ee864018c689f4978a1: There is a special patch for growing Belladonna - I believe that it is somewhere near Draynor Manor, where the ground is a tad 'unblessed'.
textByHashes.bdb606ebc97dab841a6849b38e89579be3605829: Applying compost to a patch will not only reduce the chance that your crops will get diseased, but you will also grow more crops to harvest.
textByHashes.54045b3bbdd54aa75f5e896632323b9c1643a738: If you want to grow fruit trees you could try a few places: Catherby, Brimhaven, Gnome Stronghold and the Farming Guild all have fruit tree patches.
textByHashes.82b3bb051e232dbf89fa6df668611f47d4ad2bb4: You can fill plantpots with soil from any empty patch, if you have a gardening trowel.
textByHashes.532c2f53eeb1eee0e9c290a18fd1128a373a915e: Hops are good for brewing ales. I believe there's a brewery up in Keldagrim somewhere, and I've heard rumours that a place called Phasmatys used to be good for that type of thing. 'Fore they all died, of course.
textByHashes.89b3d09817bb8064531176f780ffdeb6fb5e6a03: Vegetables, hops and flowers need constant watering - if you ignore my advice, you will sooner or later find yourself in possession of a dead farming patch.
textByHashes.55311f0bfe322285664c0c9f55e1c4011b33b9e4: You can put up to five tomatoes, strawberries, apples, bananas or oranges into a fruit basket, although you can't have a mix in the same basket.
textByHashes.0e23b2ce623239ece1296cca620e077ffe67cf10: Don't just throw away your weeds after you've raked a patch - put them in a compost bin and make some compost.
textByHashes.0206bbeea462347154a3e9467aea9a4ee52f93db: There are five other Farming areas like this one - Elstan's area near Falador, Dantaera's area near Catherby, Lyra's area in Morytania, Marisi's area in Hosidius and Alan's area in the Farming Guild.
textByHashes.d73ef6ae6fe3da233413e13f92bfbea5f1de3cbd: There are five other Farming areas like this one - Elstan's area near Falador, Dantaera's area near Catherby, Lyra's area in Morytania, Marisi's area in Hosidius, Alan's area in the Farming Guild and Oswallt's
textByHashes.d46691d570a70f6a1d88c2fec06b6e861e94c541: If you want to make your own sacks and baskets you'll need to use the loom that's near the Farming shop in Falador. If you're a good enough craftsman, that is.
textByHashes.20e3f04e5791785d37c8525109dc22537f5e59ba: If you want to make your own sacks and baskets you'll need to use the loom that's near the Farming shop in Falador. If you're a good enough craftswoman, that is.
textByHashes.28808ca5eda526554b0caa99c08e7f545b26b0f3: You don't have to buy all your plantpots you know, you can make them yourself on a pottery wheel. If you're a good enough craftsman, that is.
textByHashes.5a5f6990cbed15a5951025baa60d4864c8dc4455: You don't have to buy all your plantpots you know, you can make them yourself on a pottery wheel. If you're a good enough craftswoman, that is.
textByHashes.1fc91822a6dd38a1807d1ec0d6aa54c61e2e9529: That depends on whether I have it to sell. What is it that you're looking for?
textByHashes.a51cdf72f0b2b8b5e851da91043ac299caa1aa82: Plant cure, eh? I might have some put aside for myself. Tell you what, I'll sell you some plant cure for 25 coins if you like.
textByHashes.f396d0e2f6f397730e17adfd3e54f96ff74fb88b: A bucket of compost, eh? I might have one spare... tell you what, I'll sell it to you for 35 coins if you like.
textByHashes.b2941d6dc55521fcde70a73e96ac545bea943cb7: A rake, eh? I might have one spare... tell you what, I'll sell it to you for 15 coins if you like.
textByHashes.f4690b47fb36f6e8062ceecf917120be8ec67891: Eh, I suppose I can spare you a plant pot, but I'll want 40 coins for it.
textByHashes.aabe0b6c657fbbf792905b4ed2fb1cc30adf585d: A watering can, eh? I might have one spare... tell you what, I'll sell it to you for 25 coins if you like.
textByHashes.1484caf97dc54f48c63e7eee46d6fa1c9b425565: A gardening trowel, eh? I might have one spare... tell you what, I'll sell it to you for 15 coins if you like.
textByHashes.6375c9acc18ebc3accc9f2430bd53e11697376a5: A seed dibber, eh? I might have one spare... tell you what, I'll sell it to you for 15 coins if you like.
textByHashes.17a7874b3e46e001b95d1350f6f02f713d319256: I'm already looking after that patch for you.
textByHashes.918837e2de22843d0316f9943f148166603f0a12: I want 2 buckets of compost for that.
textByHashes.24c4d00bae2b5d4d841950ee3baa2ca307466a1a: I want one sack of potatoes for that.
textByHashes.c8461caa99112aec7cf63f765a12da654c9953c2: I want one sack of onions for that.
textByHashes.b7ce31a17e410ad99be97aa8d64829855459cb1d: I want 2 sacks of cabbages for that.
textByHashes.e1918163cf2aa47930390ed0e95f5e64eb03a8c7: I want 10 jute fibres for that.
textByHashes.013bdc5c9dcae7c92df714f7dcf7c7b91da9aa15: I want one basket of apples for that.
textByHashes.940c465bb8f1ddad9083ab4f27cbec14de27ffb4: I want 10 curry leaves for that.
textByHashes.602adeffce6a3a8dfb3fd3706b2e7c8c0c00950a: That looks like something that you can make normal compost out of. Fill up the compost bin with stuff like that, and you'll eventually have a bin full of compost.
textByHashes.0721aa71f3ba300da9943b98b40a7655110789a8: That looks like something that you can make supercompost out of. Fill up the compost bin with stuff like that, and you'll eventually have a bin full of supercompost.
textByHashes.e29bfea028c31f36a562503386f5cf9572b3398a: Yes, certainly. I'll help if I can. Which quest would you like help with?
